{{Quote|Nothing to make me feel this planet has any potential as a rebel base!|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="The Bounty Hunter of Ord Mantell">"[[The Bounty Hunter of Ord Mantell]]"</ref>}}
'''Jarnollen''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in close proximity to [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was covered in tropical [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]], and its [[Tree/Legends|trees]] possessed overgrown [[Vine/Legends|vines]].

==History==
[[File:CSW1-Jungle.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] on Jarnollen.]]
Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Jarnollen was the location of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] training center. Not knowing of the Imperial presence on the planet, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] were [[Mission to Jarnollen|dispatched to the world]] to [[Scout/Legends|scout]] its potential as a new [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base. They learned of the Imperial presence just as an Imperial patrol came upon their ship, destroying it with [[Proton grenade/Legends|proton grenades]] and dispatching all available forces to track the Rebels down. The pair spent much of that night and dawn the next morning evading an Imperial [[All Terrain Advance Raider|AT-AR]], before being rescued by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']].

[[File:ATARtraining.jpg|thumb|right|180px|An [[All Terrain Advance Raider|AT-AR]] on Jarnollen.]]

==Behind the scenes==
This planet was unnamed in the original comic. However, material written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] for the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' called "[[The Jarnollen Expedition]]" would have named the planet, had the ''Journal'' not folded. Finally in 2008, the name was made official in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', co-authored by Hidalgo.
